strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services — directly matching the role's experience profile.
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — concrete, current AI-builder fluency.
Founder of GISCollective, a Kubernetes-deployable open-source platform serving NGOs globally — demonstrates entrepreneurial drive, product ownership, and cloud-native design end-to-end.
concerns: No formal Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, though preferred rather than required.
Title history centers on Senior/Staff IC roles rather than Director-level scope.
Cloud experience is present but not framed around hyperscaler platform strategy at enterprise scale.

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP builder experience
15+ years across software, infrastructure, and embedded engineering
Founder of production open-source cloud-deployed platform

response.justification: Bogdan brings the full 15-year engineering arc the role requires, with unusual breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services — and is presently building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq, placing him squarely on the AI builder frontier the role targets. As founder of GISCollective, a Kubernetes-deployable open-source platform used by international NGOs, he demonstrates the entrepreneurial, product-minded, cloud-fluent profile the preferred qualifications call for. His record of public talks, workshops, and craftsmanship advocacy (TDD, trunk-based development, refactoring dojos) shows the inspire-others dimension central to a Principal IC mandate, making him a strong fit to advance.
